sections.paragraph:
- Original: προτείνω

- Transliteration: Proteino

- Phonetic: prot-i'-no

- Definition:

1. to stretch forth, stretch out

a. when they had stretched one out on the thongs i.e. to receive the blows of the thongs (by tying him up to a beam or a pillar)

- Origin: from G4253 and teino (to stretch)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and τείνω teinō (to stretch); to protend that is tie prostrate (for scourging): - bind.
